quality.rationale: 基于四维矢量标量积的不变性证明，结合观测者静止系验证，物理动机明确且结构可推广至任意度规

origin.question: Problem 1.20. A particle of rest mass $m$ and 4-momentum $p$ is examined by an observer with 4-velocity $u$ . Show that:(a) the energy he measures is $\mathbf{E} = -\mathbf{p}\cdot \mathbf{u}$
origin.solution: Solution 1.20. In the rest frame of the observer,$$\\mathbf {u}^{0} = 1, \\quad \\mathbf {u}^{\\mathbf {j}} = 0$$$$\\mathbf {p}^{0} = - \\mathbf {p}_{0} = \\mathbf {E}$$$$\\mathbf {p}^{\\mathrm {j}} = \\mathbf {p}_{\\mathrm {j}} = \\underline {{\\mathbf {p}}}$$so, we verify the invariant formulas in this easiest frame:(a) $\mathbf{E} = -\mathbf{p}_0\mathbf{u}^0 = -\mathbf{p}\cdot \mathbf{u}$(b) $\mathbf{m}^2 = \mathbf{E}^2 - |\widetilde{\mathbf{p}}|^2 = -\mathbf{p}_0 \mathbf{p}^0 - \mathbf{p}_j \mathbf{p}^j = -\mathbf{p} \cdot \mathbf{p}$(c) $\left|\underline{\mathbf{p}}\right| = \left(\mathbf{E}^{2} - \mathfrak{m}^{2}\right)^{\frac{1}{2}} = \left[(\mathbf{p}\cdot \mathbf{u})^{2} + \mathbf{p}\cdot \mathbf{p}\right]^{\frac{1}{2}}$(d) $\left|\underline{\mathbf{v}}\right| = \frac{\left|\underline{\mathbf{p}}\right|}{\underline{\mathbf{E}}} = \left[\frac{\underline{\mathbf{E}}^2 - \underline{\mathbf{m}}^2}{\underline{\mathbf{E}}^2}\right]^{\frac{1}{2}} = \left[1 + \frac{\underline{\mathbf{p}}\cdot\underline{\mathbf{p}}}{(\underline{\mathbf{p}}\cdot\underline{\mathbf{u}})^2}\right]^{\frac{1}{2}}$(e) In the rest frame,$$\\mathbf {v}^{0} = - \\mathbf {u}^{0} - \\frac {\\mathbf {p}^{0}}{(- E)} = - 1 + 1 = 0$$$$v^{j} = - u^{j} - \\frac {p^{j}}{(- E)} = 0 + \\frac {d x^{j}}{d t}.$$
